when.test: (groupId != null and groupId != '') or (startDate != null and startDate != '') or (endDate != null and endDate != '')

choose.otherwise: SELECT s.DATA_TYPE AS datatype, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, 0 AS truePositiveCount, 0 AS falsePositiveCount, 0 AS processedCount, COUNT(*) AS unprocessedCount, 0 AS truePositiveRate FROM pi_summary s GROUP BY s.DATA_TYPE ORDER BY totalCount DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT t.TARGET_ID AS targetNo, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, COALESCE(ptg.NAME, '미그룹') AS groupName, tg.idx AS groupId, COUNT(*) AS totalDetections, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS truePositiveCount FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO INNER JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.TARGET_ID = dp.TARGET_ID AND f.HASH_ID = dp.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y'
AND tg.idx IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg2.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg2 INNER JOIN CTE ON tg2.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
GROUP BY t.TARGET_ID, t.AP_NO, t.NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip, ptg.NAME, tg.idx ORDER BY truePositiveCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT t.TARGET_ID AS targetNo, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, COALESCE(ptg.NAME, '미그룹') AS groupName, tg.idx AS groupId, COUNT(*) AS totalDetections, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS falsePositiveCount FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO INNER JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.TARGET_ID = dp.TARGET_ID AND f.HASH_ID = dp.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'N'
AND tg.idx IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg2.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg2 INNER JOIN CTE ON tg2.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
GROUP BY t.TARGET_ID, t.AP_NO, t.NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip, ptg.NAME, tg.idx ORDER BY falsePositiveCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.DATA_TYPE AS datatype, SUM(s.MATCH_COUNT) AS totalCount, 0 AS truePositiveCount, 0 AS falsePositiveCount, 0 AS processedCount, 0 AS truePositiveRate FROM pi_summary s INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON s.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND s.AP_NO = t.AP_NO WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND t.GROUP_IDX IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg INNER JOIN CTE ON tg.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
GROUP BY s.DATA_TYPE ORDER BY totalCount DESC
